entry.title: microsoft / Ontology-Playground
entry.summary: Free, open-source web app for learning about ontologies and Microsoft Fabric IQ. Explore a catalogue of pre-built ontologies, design your own visually, export as RDF/XML, and share interactive diagrams. Zero backend, fully static.
entry.content:
Free, open-source web app for learning about ontologies and Microsoft Fabric IQ. Explore a catalogue of pre-built ontologies, design your own visually, export as RDF/XML, and share interactive diagrams. Zero backend, fully static.

entry.title: diegosouzapw / OmniRoute
entry.summary: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi K3, GLM, DeepSeek. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, multimodal, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors.
entry.content:
Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi K3, GLM, DeepSeek. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, multimodal, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors.

entry.title: tirth8205 / code-review-graph
entry.summary: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
entry.content:
Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
